LanguageData.ARA_Chrony.label: "Warrior Type" Croni
LanguageData.ARA_Chrony.description: Croni is an Arachne warrior breed insect. Although it is petite, it is extremely aggressive and will launch more powerful large-scale attacks during the cycle. Additionally, she would have fewer visitors and wanderers passing through, and would not send out Men in Black when the colony was about to fall.
